rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Forwarding Criteria

rules.rule_text:
title: Email Forwarding Rule - Suspicious Forwarding Criteria
id: 7315f2c5-892c-4c18-bda4-b788ef9219a2
status: experimental
description: "Detects the creation of email forwarding rules with suspicious strings\
  \ indicating\nforwarding criteria meant to steal sensitive information. Part of\
  \ the RedCanary \n2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/email-forwarding-rule/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.t1114
- attack.t1114.003
logsource:
  service: exchange
  product: m365
detection:
  selection:
    Workload: Exchange
    Operation:
    - New-InboxRule
    - Set-InboxRule
    Parameters|contains:
    - ACH
    - Invoice
    - Payroll
    - Password Reset
    - Login code
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
